news.title: Parents’ excessive internet use may be lnked to depression in their teenagers
news.summary_en: A team of University of Wisconsin–Madison researchers found that parents’ internet use can negatively impact their kids’ well-being, but there are ways to help navigate and reduce this.

news.title: UW–Madison’s Unal recieves Early Childhood Champion Award
news.summary_en: Cigdem Unal received the Early Childhood Champion Award from the National Coalition for Campus Children's Centers (N4C) at the 2026 national conference.
